summary: Added per-owner RLS SQL migration for dday_events: drops any USING(true) policies, enables RLS, creates SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE policies scoped to auth.uid()=user_id. Added user_id to DdayEvent type and service now injects auth user id on createEvent.
next_actions: Apply migration via Supabase dashboard SQL editor or supabase db push
Ensure app has an auth flow so users can log in before creating events
